prompt.content:
You are a spatial reasoning assistant analyzing a 3D scene image.
You will receive a list of objects visible in the image and a set of distance comparison questions.

For each question, compare 3D distances — either between two pairs of objects,
or from a common anchor object to two candidate objects.
Answer with exactly one of: "<" (first pair/candidate closer), "~=" (approximately equal), ">" (first pair/candidate farther).

Respond ONLY with a JSON array. Each element must have "qid" and "answer" (a string: "<", "~=", or ">").

Example:
[{"qid": "qrr_0001", "answer": "<"}, {"qid": "qrr_0002", "answer": "~="}]

content.text:
Objects in the image:
  - obj_0: small red metal cylinder
  - obj_1: large yellow metal sphere
  - obj_2: large brown rubber sphere
  - obj_3: small brown metal sphere
  - obj_4: small gray metal cube
  - obj_5: large brown metal cube
  - obj_6: small red metal cylinder
  - obj_7: small yellow rubber cylinder

Questions:
[qrr_0081] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0082] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0083] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_6 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_7. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0084] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_2. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0085] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_3. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0086] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0087] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0088] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_1 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0089] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0090] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0091] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_2 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0092] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0093] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0094] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0095] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0096] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_4 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0097] Compare the distance between obj_0 and obj_7 vs the distance between obj_5 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0098] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_4. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0099] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_5. Answer: < / ~= / >
[qrr_0100] Compare the distance between obj_1 and obj_2 vs the distance between obj_3 and obj_6. Answer: < / ~= / >

raw_response:
I need to analyze the 3D distances between objects in these scenes. Let me carefully examine each image and the object positions.

Looking at the images, I need to identify the objects and their 3D positions across the different scene views to answer the distance comparison questions.

Let me analyze the scenes carefully:

Image 1: gray cube (left-back), brown cube (back-center), brown rubber ball (center), brown metal ball (front-center), yellow metal ball (center-right), red cylinder (back-right), yellow rubber cylinder (front-right)

Image 2: brown metal ball (left), red cylinder (front-left), brown rubber ball (center-back), gray cube (center-back), yellow rubber cylinder (front-center), yellow metal ball (center), brown cube (right-center), red cylinder (front-right)

Image 3: red cylinder (left-back), yellow rubber cylinder (left-front), brown cube (front-left), gray cube (front-center), yellow metal ball (center), brown rubber ball (right-center), yellow rubber ball (back), red cylinder (right-back), brown metal ball (right)

Image 4: red cylinder (left), yellow metal ball (center-left), brown rubber ball (center), brown metal ball (back-center), gray cube (front-center), brown cube (center-right), yellow rubber ball/sphere (back), red cylinder (right)

The questions reference obj_0 through obj_7. Based on image 4's scene:
- obj_0: red cylinder (left)
- obj_1: yellow metal sphere
- obj_2: brown rubber sphere
- obj_3: brown metal sphere (small, back)
- obj_4: gray cube
- obj_5: brown metal cube
- obj_6: red cylinder (right)
- obj_7: yellow rubber cylinder/sphere (back)
